metadata.description: Crisis scenarios for Nation Builder educational game

random.title: Natural Disaster Strikes {nation}
random.description: A major earthquake has struck the capital region, causing widespread damage and disrupting essential services.
random.context: Emergency services are overwhelmed and thousands of citizens need immediate assistance.

choices.text: Massive government disaster relief and reconstruction program
choices.consequences: Comprehensive government response builds public trust but significantly increases national debt.

choices.text: Coordinate private sector and volunteer relief efforts
choices.consequences: Market-based response mobilizes resources efficiently but coverage may be uneven.

choices.text: Focus on long-term resilience and disaster prevention
choices.consequences: Investment in resilience helps prevent future disasters but provides limited immediate relief.

consequences.immediate: The disaster has caused significant infrastructure damage and displaced thousands of families.
consequences.longTerm: Recovery efforts will shape public expectations of government crisis response for years to come.

random.title: Pandemic Outbreak in {nation}
random.description: A highly contagious disease has emerged, spreading rapidly across the nation and threatening public health.
random.context: Hospitals are reaching capacity and the economy faces potential shutdown.

choices.text: Strict lockdowns and comprehensive government health response
choices.consequences: Aggressive public health measures save lives but damage the economy and restrict freedoms.

choices.text: Voluntary guidelines with market-based healthcare solutions
choices.consequences: Light-touch approach preserves economic activity but may result in higher infection rates.

choices.text: Targeted protection for vulnerable populations
choices.consequences: Focused approach balances health and economic concerns while protecting the most vulnerable.

consequences.immediate: The pandemic is spreading rapidly and overwhelming healthcare systems.
consequences.longTerm: The response will define the relationship between individual liberty and collective health.

random.title: Major Cyber Attack on {nation}
random.description: Foreign hackers have launched a coordinated cyber attack on critical infrastructure and government systems.
random.context: Power grids, financial systems, and communication networks are compromised.

choices.text: Massive cybersecurity expansion and digital surveillance
choices.consequences: Enhanced cybersecurity protects against future attacks but increases government surveillance.

choices.text: Public-private cybersecurity partnership
choices.consequences: Collaborative approach leverages private sector expertise while maintaining oversight.

choices.text: International cooperation and cyber diplomacy
choices.consequences: Diplomatic approach builds international norms but may be slower to implement.

consequences.immediate: Critical systems are offline and national security is compromised.
consequences.longTerm: The response will shape digital security policy and international cyber relations.

random.title: Refugee Crisis at {nation}'s Borders
random.description: Thousands of refugees from a neighboring conflict have arrived seeking asylum and safety.
random.context: Border facilities are overwhelmed and public opinion is divided on how to respond.

choices.text: Open borders with comprehensive refugee support programs
choices.consequences: Humanitarian response enhances international reputation but strains domestic resources.

choices.text: Controlled admission with integration requirements
choices.consequences: Measured approach balances humanitarian concerns with domestic stability.

choices.text: Strict border controls and minimal refugee admission
choices.consequences: Restrictive policy maintains domestic stability but damages international relationships.

consequences.immediate: Thousands of refugees need immediate shelter, food, and medical care.
consequences.longTerm: The response will define the nation's approach to immigration and humanitarian crises.

random.title: Trade War Threatens {nation}'s Economy
random.description: A major trading partner has imposed significant tariffs on key exports, threatening economic stability.
random.context: Export industries are facing massive losses and workers fear unemployment.

choices.text: Retaliatory tariffs and trade protection measures
choices.consequences: Protectionist response defends domestic industry but escalates trade conflict.

choices.text: Economic diversification and new market development
choices.consequences: Market-based adaptation creates new opportunities but takes time to develop.

choices.text: Worker retraining and social support programs
choices.consequences: Social support helps workers transition but requires significant government investment.

consequences.immediate: Export industries are laying off workers and economic uncertainty is rising.
consequences.longTerm: The response will shape the nation's approach to international trade and economic policy.

random.title: Energy Crisis Grips {nation}
random.description: Rising energy costs and supply disruptions are causing widespread economic hardship.
random.context: Citizens face high heating bills while businesses struggle with production costs.

choices.text: Emergency renewable energy transition program
choices.consequences: Aggressive green transition addresses long-term sustainability but requires massive investment.

choices.text: Domestic fossil fuel expansion and energy independence
choices.consequences: Fossil fuel expansion provides short-term relief but worsens environmental problems.

choices.text: Energy efficiency programs and consumption reduction
choices.consequences: Conservation approach reduces demand but may not fully address supply issues.

consequences.immediate: Energy costs are rising rapidly and supply disruptions are affecting daily life.
consequences.longTerm: The response will determine the nation's energy future and environmental trajectory.

random.title: Major Corruption Scandal Rocks {nation}
random.description: High-ranking government officials have been implicated in a massive corruption scheme.
random.context: Public trust in government is plummeting as details of the scandal emerge.

choices.text: Comprehensive anti-corruption investigation and reforms
choices.consequences: Thorough investigation restores trust but may reveal more systemic problems.

choices.text: Limited investigation to maintain government stability
choices.consequences: Controlled response maintains stability but fails to address underlying corruption.

choices.text: Independent oversight and citizen participation in reforms
choices.consequences: Citizen-led reforms build democratic engagement but may slow immediate action.

consequences.immediate: Government credibility is severely damaged and public protests are growing.
consequences.longTerm: The response will shape public trust in institutions and democratic governance.

random.title: Demographic Crisis Challenges {nation}
random.description: Rapidly aging population and declining birth rates threaten economic sustainability.
random.context: Healthcare and pension systems face overwhelming pressure as the workforce shrinks.

choices.text: Comprehensive family support and childcare programs
choices.consequences: Family support programs may boost birth rates but require significant public investment.

choices.text: Immigration programs to address workforce shortages
choices.consequences: Immigration addresses immediate workforce needs but may create social tensions.

choices.text: Automation and technology to maintain productivity
choices.consequences: Technology solutions maintain economic output but may displace workers.

consequences.immediate: Social services are strained and economic growth is slowing.
consequences.longTerm: The response will determine how the nation adapts to fundamental demographic changes.

consequenceDriven.title: Market Instability from Policy Conflicts
consequenceDriven.description: Conflicting economic policies have created uncertainty and market volatility.
consequenceDriven.context: Investors are confused by mixed signals from government policy directions.

choices.text: Clarify commitment to free market principles
Strengthen redistribution and market regulation

consequenceDriven.title: Resistance to Authoritarian Measures
consequenceDriven.description: Growing resistance movements challenge increasing government authority.
consequenceDriven.context: Civil society groups organize against expanding state control.

choices.text: Suppress resistance movements
Engage in dialogue and compromise

consequenceDriven.title: Economic Backlash Against Environmental Policies
consequenceDriven.description: Business groups and workers protest against strict environmental regulations.
consequenceDriven.context: Environmental policies are blamed for economic hardship and job losses.

choices.text: Maintain environmental priorities despite opposition
Moderate environmental policies to address economic concerns

consequenceDriven.title: Mass Protests Against Growing Inequality
consequenceDriven.description: Widespread protests erupt as income inequality reaches critical levels.
consequenceDriven.context: Citizens demand action on wealth concentration and social mobility.

choices.text: Implement emergency wealth redistribution measures
Focus on economic growth to lift all incomes
